channel.title: Lazy Cat – dev blog
channel.description: Code by day, blog by night. Join me on my backend journey as we learn and grow together.

item.title: Find which process is running on a certain port and kill it
item.description: Identify and terminate processes running on a specific port in your dev environment.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: How to disable popup showing accented characters when press and hold a key on macOS
item.description: How to disable popup showing accented characters when press and hold a key on macOS.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)

item.title: Macos command to zip files and directories into a single file.
item.description: Macos command to zip files and directories into a single file.
item.author: (Son Vu Quang)
